name: Easy Orange Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, orange juice, and eggs. Beat by hand approximately 300 times.
2. Add the grated orange rind for the final round of beating.
3. Pour the batter into a well-greased-and floured 2-quart mold or spring-form pan.
4. Place the pan in the slow cooker and cover with a loosely fitting plate.
5. Cover the pot, but prop the lid open slightly with a toothpick or a twist of foil to allow excess steam to escape.
6. Cook on High for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes before turning the cake out of the pan.
Makes 10 to 12 servings.
Source: "Clear & Simple Crockery Cooking", by Jacqueline Heriteau, Grosset & Dunlap, NY, c1975
